response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing or navigation pipelines, and the resume shows no evidence of distributed systems, real-time traffic integration, or routing tile optimization — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Proven experience in geospatial data platforms via open-source GISCollective
Strong track record in building scalable, event-driven systems across languages
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks
concerns: No visible C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing or navigation systems
Lacks explicit mention of distributed systems, fault tolerance, or routing tile optimization
Primary language focus is TypeScript/Node.js/Dlang, not the required C++ core
